description: Tier-2 specialist — property-based tests via Hypothesis (Python) / fast-check (TS); round-trip and no-exception invariants; CI as nightly not per-PR.

cases.prompt: I have a Python JSON serializer/deserializer: `serialize(obj) -> str` and `deserialize(s) -> obj`. Write property-based tests that prove round-trip correctness and that deserialize never raises on any string output of serialize.
cases.notes: Must use hypothesis. Must assert round-trip invariant.

cases.prompt: Write property-based tests in TypeScript for a `sortAndDeduplicate(arr: number[]): number[]` function. Assert: output is sorted, output has no duplicates, every element of output appeared in input.
cases.notes: Must use fast-check. Must assert all 3 invariants.

cases.prompt: Should we run property-based and fuzz tests on every pull request?
cases.notes: Must recommend nightly/scheduled not per-PR, scoped to critical code (parsers, crypto, etc.).
